---
title: "Quarto Basics"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---

For a demonstration of a line plot on a polar axis, see @fig-polar.
[Blog](./blog/)

```{python}
#| label: fig-polar
#| fig-cap: "A line plot on a polar axis"
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

x = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
y = [1, 4, 9, 16, 25]

plt.plot(x, y)

plt.xlabel('X-axis')
plt.ylabel('Y-axis')
plt.title('Simple Plot')

plt.show()
```
